---
name: 📚 Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue with documentation or request documentation improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 📚 Documentation Issue

**Type of documentation issue:**
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated content
- [ ] Unclear instructions
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Formatting issues
- [ ] Translation needed

## 📍 Location

**Where is the documentation issue?**
- File: [e.g. docs/GETTING_STARTED.md]
- Section: [e.g. "Installation Steps"]
- Line number (if applicable): [e.g. Line 45]
- URL (if applicable): [e.g. https://github.com/Mostafa-SAID7/Naar-Noor/blob/main/docs/API.md]

## 🐛 Current Issue

**What's wrong with the current documentation?**
A clear description of the issue with the existing documentation.

## ✅ Suggested Improvement

**What should be changed or added?**
Describe what the documentation should say or include.

## 📝 Proposed Content

If you have specific content suggestions, please provide them here:

```markdown
Your proposed documentation content here
```

## 🎯 Target Audience

Who is this documentation for?

- [ ] New developers getting started
- [ ] Experienced developers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Contributors

## 📊 Impact

How does this documentation issue affect users?

- [ ] Prevents getting started
- [ ] Causes confusion
- [ ] Leads to errors
- [ ] Wastes time
- [ ] Minor inconvenience

## 🔍 Research Done

Have you:

- [ ] Searched existing documentation
- [ ] Checked related issues
- [ ] Looked at the source code
- [ ] Tested the instructions

## 📱 Affected Documentation

Which documentation files are affected?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/GETTING_STARTED.md
- [ ] docs/API.md
- [ ] docs/FRONTEND.md
- [ ] docs/BACKEND.md
- [ ] docs/DATABASE.md
- [ ] docs/DEPLOYMENT.md
- [ ] docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md
- [ ] docs/CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🌍 Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue here.

## 🔗 Related Resources

Link any related documentation, issues, or external resources:

- Related documentation: 
- Similar issues: 
- External references: 

## 🏷️ Labels

Please add relevant labels:

- Type: `documentation`, `tutorial`, `reference`, `guide`
- Priority: `low`, `medium`, `high`
- Difficulty: `beginner-friendly`, `intermediate`, `advanced`
